# babelmixr2

The goal of babelmixr2 is to convert nlmixr2 syntax to other commonly
used tools.

## Installation

You can install the released version of babelmixr2 from
[CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org) with:

``` r

install.packages("babelmixr2")
```

You can install from r-universe by:

``` r

# Download and install babelmixr2 in R
install.packages('babelmixr2',
                 repos = c(
                   nlmixr2 = 'https://nlmixr2.r-universe.dev',
                   CRAN = 'https://cloud.r-project.org'))
```

Otherwise you can always install from GitHub:

## What you can do with `babelmixr2`

Babelmixr2 can help you by:

- Running your nlmixr2 model in a commercial nonlinear mixed effects
  modeling tool like
  [`NONMEM`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/articles/running-nonmem.html)
  or `Monolix`

- Convert your [`NONMEM` model to a nlmixr2
  model](https://nlmixr2.github.io/nonmem2rx/articles/convert-nlmixr2.html)
  (in conjunction with `nonmem2rx`)

- Convert you [`Monolix` model to a nlmixr2
  model](https://nlmixr2.github.io/monolix2rx/articles/convert-nlmixr2.html)
  (in conjunction with `monolix2rx`)

- Calculate scaling factors and automatically add initial conditions
  based on non-compartmental analysis (using `PKNCA`)

- Perform Optimal design using nlmixr2 as an interface to `PopED`

## Monolix Setup

While not required, you can get/install the R ‘lixoftConnectors’ package
in the ‘Monolix’ installation, as described at the following url
<https://monolixsuite.slp-software.com/r-functions/2024R1/installation-and-initialization>.
When ‘lixoftConnectors’ is available, R can run ‘Monolix’ directly
instead of using a command line.

## PKNCA Example

After installed, if you use the standard interface, you can obtain new
initial estimates with PKNCA:

``` r

mod <-
  nlmixr2(
    nlmixrFun, nlmmixrData, est = "pknca",
    control = pkncaControl(concu = "ng/mL", doseu = "mg", timeu = "hr", volumeu = "L")
  )
```

## Monolix example

With babelmixr2 loaded, you can use `nlmixr2` to convert a nlmixr2 model
to Monolix, run with monolix, and import back to nlmixr2 with the
following:

``` r

mod <- nlmixr(nlmixrFun, nlmmixrData, est="monolix")
```

## NONMEM example

With babelmixr2 loaded you can use `nlmixr2` to convert a nlmixr2 model
to NONMEM, run NONMEM and import back to nlmixr2 with the following:

``` r

mod <- nlmixr(nlmixrFun, nlmmixrData, est="nonmem")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`as.nlmixr2()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/as.nlmixr2.md)
  [`as.nlmixr()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/as.nlmixr2.md)
  : Convert an object to a nlmixr2 fit object

- [`babel.poped.database()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/babel.poped.database.md)
  : Expand a babelmixr2 PopED database

- [`babelBpopIdx()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/babelBpopIdx.md)
  :

  Get the bpop_idx by variable name for a poped database created by
  `babelmixr2`

- [`bblDatToMonolix()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/bblDatToMonolix.md)
  [`bblDatToNonmem()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/bblDatToMonolix.md)
  [`bblDatToRxode()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/bblDatToMonolix.md)
  [`bblDatToMrgsolve()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/bblDatToMonolix.md)
  [`bblDatToPknca()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/bblDatToMonolix.md)
  : Convert nlmixr2-compatible data to other formats (if possible)

- [`.nlmerNlmerFun()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/dot-nlmerNlmerFun.md)
  : Surrogate gradient function for lme4::nlmer

- [`.setupPopEDdatabase()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/dot-setupPopEDdatabase.md)
  : Setup the poped database

- [`fmeMcmcControl()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/fmeMcmcControl.md)
  : Control for fmeMcmc estimation method in nlmixr2

- [`getStandardColNames()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/getStandardColNames.md)
  : Determine standardized rxode2 column names from data

- [`modelUnitConversion()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/modelUnitConversion.md)
  : Unit conversion for pharmacokinetic models

- [`monolixControl()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/monolixControl.md)
  : Monolix Controller for nlmixr2

- [`nlmixr2Est(`*`<nlmer>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/nlmixr2Est.nlmer.md)
  : nlmixr2 estimation using lme4::nlmer

- [`nlmixr2Est(`*`<pknca>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/nlmixr2Est.pknca.md)
  : Estimate starting parameters using PKNCA

- [`nlmixr2NlmerControl()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/nlmixr2NlmerControl.md)
  [`nlmerControl()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/nlmixr2NlmerControl.md)
  : Control for nlmer estimation method in nlmixr2

- [`nonmemControl()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/nonmemControl.md)
  : NONMEM estimation control

- [`pkncaControl()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/pkncaControl.md)
  : PKNCA estimation control

- [`popedControl()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/popedControl.md)
  : Control for a PopED design task

- [`popedGetMultipleEndpointModelingTimes()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/popedGetMultipleEndpointModelingTimes.md)
  [`popedMultipleEndpointIndexDataFrame()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/popedGetMultipleEndpointModelingTimes.md)
  : Get Multiple Endpoint Modeling Times

- [`popedMultipleEndpointResetTimeIndex()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/popedMultipleEndpointResetTimeIndex.md)
  : Reset the Global Time Indexer for Multiple Endpoint Modeling

- [`pseudoOptimControl()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/pseudoOptimControl.md)
  : Control for fmeMcmc estimation method in nlmixr2

- [`rxToMonolix()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxToMonolix.md)
  : Convert RxODE syntax to monolix syntax

- [`rxToNonmem()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxToNonmem.md)
  : Convert RxODE syntax to NONMEM syntax

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<loadPruneNlmer>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.loadPruneNlmer.md)
  : Load pruned nlmer model into symengine (no sensitivity promotion)

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<loadPruneNlmerSens>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.loadPruneNlmerSens.md)
  : Load pruned nlmer model into symengine (with sensitivity promotion)

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<nlmerEnv>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.nlmerEnv.md)
  : Full nlmer symengine environment with sensitivities

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<nlmerFormula>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.nlmerFormula.md)
  : Build the full 3-part nlmer formula

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<nlmerHdTheta>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.nlmerHdTheta.md)
  :

  Compute d(f)/d(`THETA[i]`) for all nlmer parameters

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<nlmerModel0>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.nlmerModel0.md)
  :

  nlmer base model (saem-dropped etas, `THETA[i]` prefix, nlme error
  lines)

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<nlmerParams>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.nlmerParams.md)
  :

  params() string for the nlmer `THETA[i]`-indexed model

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<nlmerRandomFormula>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.nlmerRandomFormula.md)
  : Build the random-effects part (part 3) of the nlmer 3-part formula

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<nlmerSensModel>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.nlmerSensModel.md)
  : Compiled nlmer sensitivity model (prediction + gradients)

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<nlmerStart>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.nlmerStart.md)
  : Starting values for nlmer fixed effects

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<nlmerThetaS>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.nlmerThetaSens.md)
  :

  Compute d(state)/d(`THETA[i]`) sensitivities for nlmer

- [`rxUiGet(`*`<nlmerThetas>`*`)`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/rxUiGet.nlmerThetas.md)
  : Get the structural params to estimate for nlmer (=
  saemParamsToEstimate)

- [`saemixControl()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/saemixControl.md)
  : Control for saemix estimation method in nlmixr2

- [`simplifyUnit()`](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/reference/simplifyUnit.md)
  : Simplify units by removing repeated units from the numerator and
  denominator

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Creating a New Estimation
  Method](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/articles/new-estimation.md):
- [PopED](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/articles/PopED.md):
- [Running
  Monolix](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/articles/running-monlix.md):
- [Running NONMEM with
  nlmixr2](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/articles/running-nonmem.md):
- [Obtain initial estimates and unit conversions with
  PKNCA](https://nlmixr2.github.io/babelmixr2/articles/running-pknca.md):
